content: Having a character named Helet would be pretty confusing when there’s a character named Helot. Not sure about the actual reasoning
That won't be confusing at all. Anyway already got answer from ru team.

● 「密境收集」的「剧情导览」界面中增加了各语种剧情翻译标识，已完成正式翻译的章节会被特殊标注。守密人可前往「设置-语言」页面，选择打开相应的标签开关。
● 英语语言设置下，唤醒体「旺达」、「环行·拉蒙娜」的意识潜游剧情现由脑缸组提供正式人工翻译。
● 韩语语言设置下，忘却篇主线第一~第五章现由脑缸组提供正式人工翻译。
● 韩语语言设置下，忘却篇第六章~星辰篇第二章的机器翻译已由韩语翻译志愿者Nero、ayla、LavenderJuly进行初步审校修正。
● 韩语语言设置下，星辰篇第五章PV、新唤醒体「阿拉克涅」的广播剧字幕现由脑缸组提供正式人工翻译。
● 韩语语言设置下，新手引导文本和商店文本现由脑缸组提供正式人工翻译。
● 日语语言设置下，唤醒体「克珀珊特」的意识潜游剧情，唤醒体「弥利亚姆」的异梦视界剧情，唤醒体「莱克」的特别行动剧情已被日语翻译志愿者Alza人工翻译。
● 日语语言设置下，新一批唤醒体的天赋、技能描述，部分探索事件、道具、共鸣、关卡描述已被日语翻译志愿者Alza审校修正。
● 泰语语言设置下，部分挑战关卡界面UI文本、融灾黑潮效果描述文本已被泰语翻译志愿者darkerkuro，attchan人工翻译。
● 修复了英语语言设置下唤醒体「莫丝」身高信息错误显示为？的问题。
● 优化了英语语言设置下唤醒体「塔薇」的狂气爆发文本描述措辞。
● 修复了英语语言设置下部分常规挑战关卡的描述文本的错误翻译问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下命轮「被缚的歌谣」在相位对弈中描述文本未能正确显示数字的问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下部分剧情中错误出现代码的问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下部分敌人、唤醒体、关卡机制的衍生卡名称措辞不统一问题。
● 优化了英语语言设置下的文本显示机制。现在卡牌张数、回合数等会根据数值正确显示单复数语法了。
● 修复了繁体中文语言设置下的部分措辞问题。感谢繁体中文志愿者花子じゃん的协助！

● Added language-specific translation progress indicators to the "Story Guide" interface in the new "Handbook" interface. Chapters with completed official translations will be specially marked. Keepers can go to the "Settings - Language" page to toggle the corresponding label switches.
● Under English language settings, the Psyche Deepdive Story for Awakeners "Wanda" and "Ramona: Timeworn" are now provided with official human translation by BIAV.
● Under Korean language settings, Chapters 1 through 5 of the Faded Legacy main storyline are now provided with official human translation by BIAV.
● Under Korean language settings, the machine translation for Faded Legacy Chapter 6 through Astral Reign Chapter 2 has been preliminarily reviewed and corrected by Korean translation volunteers **Nero, ayla, and LavenderJuly.**
● Under Korean language settings, the subtitles for the Astral Reign Chapter 5 PV and the new Awakener "Arachne"'s Rudio Drama are now provided with official human translation by BIAV.
● Under Korean language settings, the tutorial text and store text are now provided with official human translations by BIAV.
● Under Japanese language settings, the Psyche Deepdive Story of Awakener "Corposant," the Dreamscape Story of Awakener "Miryam," and the Special Operation Story of Awakener "Ryker" have been translated by Japanese translation volunteer **Alza.**
● Under Japanese language settings, the Talent and skill descriptions for a new batch of Awakeners, as well as some exploration event, item, Resonance, and Stage descriptions, have been reviewed and corrected by Japanese translation volunteer **Alza.**

● Under Thai language settings, some Challenge Stage UI texts and D-Tide Effect description texts have been translated by Thai volunteer translators **darkerkuro and attchan.**
● Fixed an issue where the height information of Awakener "Vortice" was incorrectly displayed as ? under English language settings.
● Optimized the wording of Awakener "Tawil" Exalt text description under English language settings.
● Fixed an issue where description text for some regular challenge stages was incorrectly translated under English language settings.
● Fixed an issue under English language settings where the Wheel of Destiny "Song of the Bound" failed to correctly display numbers in its description text during Traphase.
● Fixed an issue where code incorrectly appeared in some Story content under English language settings.
● Fixed an issue where derived card names for certain enemies, Awakeners, and Stage mechanics were inconsistently worded under English language settings.
● Optimized the text display mechanism under English language settings. Card counts, turn counts, and similar values will now correctly display words in their singular or plural forms based on the number.
● Fixed some wording issues in the Traditional Chinese language settings. Thanks to Traditional Chinese volunteer **花子じゃん** for their help!

We also received reports on two other issues: one of Miryam's card description was inaccurate; the Aequor Symbiosis description had a wrong number.
Those turned out to be wrong in the original CN desc too. They'll be addressed in the individual bug fix section

I accidentally ran into this while looking at enlighten versions of skills..
I don't necessarily read Chinese but.. Isn't Xu's exalt(Mist-Bound Vow) E3 desc row in EN missing a whole sentence regarding the resonance effect? <:jenkin_processing:1408324289115062333> 

```
Rows
Skill_125376_Desc_0    bMZc    j技能表_Skill_A.csv    1558    Skill    Desc    徐
Skill_125376_Desc_3    bMZd    j技能表_Skill_A.csv    1558    Skill    Desc    徐

CN
Desc
【<DevouredIconKeywords:吞噬> ：临时降低所有敌人 [Exhaustion:Arg1] 点<ExhaustionIconKeywords:力量>。】获得 [Arg2] 点算力，对所有敌人施加 [Poison:Arg3] 层<IntoxicationIconKeywords:中毒>。选择：<WitherKeywords1:相许>或<WitherKeywords2:夺魄>。

Desc_3
【<DevouredIconKeywords:吞噬> ：临时降低所有敌人 [Exhaustion:Arg1] 点<ExhaustionIconKeywords:力量>。】获得 [Arg2] 点算力，对所有敌人施加 [Poison:Arg3] 层<IntoxicationIconKeywords:中毒>。自身下次触发的<ResonanceKeywords:共振>效果翻倍。选择：<WitherKeywords1:相许>或<WitherKeywords2:夺魄>。

EN
Desc
[<DevouredIconKeywords:Devour>: Temporarily reduce all enemies' <ExhaustionIconKeywords:STR> by [Exhaustion:Arg1].] Gain [Arg2] Arithmetica and inflict [Poison:Arg3] stacks of <IntoxicationIconKeywords:Poison> on all enemies. Choose: <WitherKeywords1:Betroth> or <WitherKeywords2:Enthrall>.

Desc_3
[<DevouredIconKeywords:Devour>: Temporarily reduce all enemies' 
<ExhaustionIconKeywords:STR> by [Exhaustion:Arg1].] Gain [Arg2] Arithmetica and inflict [Poison:Arg3] stacks of <IntoxicationIconKeywords:Poison> on all enemies. Choose: <WitherKeywords1:Betroth> or <WitherKeywords2:Enthrall>.
```

(fwiw, `Skill_125376_OverLimitUtlSkillDesc_3` seems to simply be the base text version of her exalt, not the overexalt version, and also has no reference to the resonance thing)
I don't own an OE xu so I couldnt tell you what the actual skill description ingame is there, but I'm guessing it's wrong too.

Yep, text is missing. What is not in EN version in desc3:
Doubles the effect of the next Resonance, triggered by Awakener.
